title: A RANK-SENSITIVE STRENGTHENING OF THE DETERMINANTAL IRRATIONALITY CRITERION FOR APÉRY LIMITS
description: This note records an observation that the order of the differential equation satisfied by the linear forms is an arithmetic resource. Feeding the derivative tower into the holonomy bound lowers the exponent 3/2 to (k+2)/(k+1), where k is the order of the underlying irreducible operator.
